notes: Quality gates passed: npm run typecheck (contracts build + tsc strict mode + hooks + evals), npm run lint (skills CLI drift, prompt validation, file-size guard), npm test (743 test files with 7601 tests + 3 frontend test files with 32 tests). All acceptance criteria (AC-1 through AC-7 in spec) are code/config-driven and covered by automated test suite: configuration resolution at 3 scopes (global/project/per-issue), mode resolver contract, convoy spawn branching, dashboard reviewer-tree gate, CLI subcommand validation, cross-harness resume routing, and six parked convoy bugs re-verification. No browser UAT required; all testable behavior verified via automated gates.
